recommendations.title: Sharknado 3: Oh Hell No!
recommendations.genres: Action, Comedy, Horror, Science Fiction, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: The sharks take bite out of the East Coast when the sharknado hits Washington, D.C. and Orlando, Florida.

recommendations.title: Hot Girls Wanted
recommendations.overview: A first-ever look at the realities of the professional “amateur” porn world and the steady stream of 18-to-19-year old girls entering into it.

recommendations.title: Baraka
recommendations.overview: A paralysingly beautiful documentary with a global vision—an odyssey through landscape and time—that attempts to capture the essence of life.

recommendations.title: Kedi
recommendations.overview: A profile of Istanbul and its unique people, seen through the eyes of the most mysterious and beloved animal humans have ever known, the Cat.

recommendations.title: The Wrath of God
recommendations.overview: Convinced the tragic deaths of her loved ones were orchestrated by a famous novelist she worked for, Luciana turns to a journalist to expose her truth.

recommendations.title: Sharknado 5: Global Swarming
recommendations.genres: Action, Comedy, Horror, Science Fiction, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: Fin and his wife April travel around the world to save their young son who's trapped inside a sharknado.

recommendations.title: Spellbound
recommendations.overview: This documentary follows 8 teens and pre-teens as they work their way toward the finals of the Scripps Howard national spelling bee championship in Washington D.C.

recommendations.title: Betting on Zero
recommendations.overview: Controversial hedge fund titan Bill Ackman is on a crusade to expose global nutritional giant Herbalife as the largest pyramid scheme in history while Herbalife execs claim Ackman is a market manipulator out to bankrupt them and make a killing off hi

recommendations.title: Sharknado 4: The 4th Awakens
recommendations.overview: The new installment of the Sharknado franchise takes place 5 years after Sharknado 3: Oh Hell No! There have been no Sharknados in the intervening years, but now they’re appearing again in unexpected ways.

recommendations.title: The Last Sharknado: It's About Time
recommendations.genres: Action, Comedy, Horror, Science Fiction, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: Our hero Fin has battled sharks all over the globe, but in this last installment he will tackle the final shark-tier - time travel.
